title: Astel Quality Report
description: The Truth Meter substrate (CLAUDE.md section 8.4). Used both inline in the manifest (summary) and as quality/report.json (full). Honesty contract: every numeric field is either a real measurement or explicit null WITH a reason. There is no '0 means we did not check.' Regressions in these metrics fail CI (CLAUDE.md section 10.3). See manifest-v0.md section 6.

geometric_error.description: L3-vs-L1 surface fidelity. Null fields require a 'reason' (e.g. pure text-to-3D has no measured reference).

chamfer_mm.description: Symmetric Chamfer distance L3 vs reference, in mm. Null if no measured reference.

method.description: Algorithm used to compute the distance (e.g. 'bidirectional_nn').

reference_layer.description: Layer used as geometric ground truth.

units.description: Distance units; fixed to mm for v0.

reason.description: Required when any distance field is null; explains why no measurement exists.

scale_confidence.description: Honest confidence interval on metric scale, mirroring manifest.scale. The interval may be wide; it is never hidden.

ci_low.description: Lower bound of the confidence interval.

ci_high.description: Upper bound of the confidence interval.

sources.description: Methods contributing to the scale estimate.

hallucination.description: Measured-vs-generated breakdown. The hallucination heatmap IS the provenance channel rendered as a colour ramp; heatmap_ref points at the provenance accessor (no separate data). Fractions sum to <= 1.0; the remainder is unknown_fraction.

heatmap_ref.description: Reference to the provenance accessor visualized as the heatmap. Either an accessor index or a relative path to a precomputed colour buffer.

oneOf.description: Accessor index in the buffer table.
Relative path to a precomputed heatmap buffer.

measured_fraction.description: Fraction of primitives with provenance >= a 'measured' threshold.

generated_fraction.description: Fraction of primitives with provenance <= a 'generated' threshold.

unknown_fraction.description: Fraction whose provenance could not be determined. Distinct from generated.

view_metrics.description: Held-out-view photometric quality (CLAUDE.md section 10.3). Null for generative-only assets with no held-out views.

psnr.description: Peak signal-to-noise ratio on held-out views, dB.

lpips.description: Learned perceptual image patch similarity (lower is better).

stage_telemetry.description: Roll-up of per-layer telemetry (sum across stages).

total_usd_estimate.description: Total estimated compute cost in USD.

caveats.description: Free-text honesty notes surfaced in the UI (e.g. 'back face unseen; completed by prior').

origin.description: How this asset was produced. 'measured' = real-capture path with ground-truth geometry; 'generated' = generative/GPU path; 'stub' = procedural placeholder. Absent means unknown/legacy.
